attributes.action: Force the UK Government to cap Petrol and Diesel Prices during the Iran war
attributes.additional_details: Cap prices at below what they are now
attributes.background: stop garages fuel suppliers and Government taking advantage of the War in Iran

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674
